name: property managers processing 10–20 maintenance requests/month tool
description: For property managers processing 10–20 maintenance requests/month, inefficient tracking causes delayed responses. We consolidate and analyze maintenance data instead of manual spreadsheets and email chains.
problem_solved: inefficient tracking of maintenance requests leads to delayed responses and tenant dissatisfaction.

locked_fields.primary_problem: inefficient tracking of maintenance requests leads to delayed responses and tenant dissatisfaction.
